title: hieracium vulgatum subsp. haemostictum
intro: Hieracium vulgatum subsp. haemostictum, also known as Haemostictum, is a subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. The medicinal properties of Haemostictum are attributed to its ability to stop bleeding and reduce inflammation, making it a potential treatment for wounds and injuries. The health benefits of Haemostictum include its anti-inflammatory and anticoagulant properties, which can help to reduce pain and swelling, and prevent blood clotting. Haemostictum can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used topically to treat wounds and injuries.
